# Glasdegib Maleate 相關新聞

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Glasdegib Maleate 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Glasdegib Maleate</strong> 目前有 <strong>14 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Glasdegib Maleate 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Daurismo is indicated, in combination with low-dose cytarabine, for the treatment of newly diagnosed de novo or secondary acute myeloid leukaemia (AML) in adult patients who are not candidates for...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia with t(8;21)(q22;q22) translocation（99.1%）</li>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia with CEBPA somatic mutations（99.1%）</li>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia with inv3(p21;q26.2) or t(3;3)(p21;q26.2)（99.0%）</li>
<li>bulbar polio（98.8%）</li>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia and myelodysplastic syndromes related to topoisomerase type 2 inhibitor（98.7%）</li>
<li>therapy related acute myeloid leukemia and myelodysplastic syndrome（98.6%）</li>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia with t(8;16)(p11;p13) translocation（98.5%）</li>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia with t(9;11)(p22;q23)（98.3%）</li>
<li>5q35 microduplication syndrome（98.1%）</li>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia and myelodysplastic syndromes related to radiation（98.1%）</li>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia and myelodysplastic syndromes related to alkylating agent（98.1%）</li>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia with t(6;9)(p23;q34)（98.1%）</li>
<li>inherited acute myeloid leukemia（97.9%）</li>
<li>unclassified acute myeloid leukemia（97.8%）</li>
<li>neuralgic amyotrophy（97.7%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic neuralgia（97.6%）</li>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia with minimal differentiation（97.5%）</li>
<li>myeloid leukemia（97.5%）</li>
<li>acute myeloblastic leukemia with maturation（97.4%）</li>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia with NPM1 somatic mutations（97.3%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/glasdegib-maleate/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
